title: MISO Generation Outages Forecast CSV download
description:
This dataset contains daily week-ahead data and forecasts from MISO on generator outags. Outage data in this dataset is available by the region and type of outage and represents MISO's forecast of outages for the peak hour in a given day. MISO derives outage data from information filed with the Control Room Operations Window (CROW) system.

The regions are:
* North
* Central
* South
* MISO

The outage types included are:
* Forced
* Derate
* Planned
* Unplanned


This dataset is derived from MISO's *Multiday Operating Margin Forecast Report*.
